description: Four speakers handle a create, update, and delete in a single conversation: update an architecture review, delete a cancelled lunch, and create a new retrospective.

events.title: Architecture Review
events.reasoning: Alice asks to move the existing architecture review from Thursday 9 AM to Thursday 1 PM. All four confirm. Duration kept at 1 hour.

events.title: Brown Bag Lunch
events.reasoning: Alice says the brown bag lunch on Wednesday is cancelled because the speaker dropped out. She instructs deletion from the calendar.

events.title: Outage Post-Mortem
events.reasoning: Alice creates a new retrospective/post-mortem for the recent outage with Dave on Monday at 3 PM for 90 minutes. Bob and Carol are explicitly not invited.

mock_llm_response.summary: Processed 3 calendar operations: updated architecture review time, deleted cancelled lunch, created new outage post-mortem.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Monday=Feb 23, Wednesday=Feb 25, Thursday=Feb 26. existing_event_id=1 for architecture review, existing_event_id=2 for brown bag lunch.
